reason: Check SubBoost auth boundary and local session reuse

9 focused OIDC route tests: login redirect+tx cookie, missing tx rejection, state mismatch, LOGIN_EXISTING success, BIND_AND_LOGIN email fallback, access denied, ID token verification failure, nonce mismatch, userinfo subject mismatch
Checked callback route: state/nonce/issuer/audience/userinfo subject validation, allowlist provisioning, local session reuse
Checked login route: PKCE verifier/challenge, signed HttpOnly SameSite=Lax tx cookie, no verifier exposure to JS
Checked tx cookie library: HMAC-SHA256 signature, expiry, version, format validation
